changeSet.author: bdqm
changeSet.comment: Maps CBS column names to Amplitude API field paths (e.g., nom → lastName, pre → individualSpecInfo.generalInfo.firstname)

changeSet.author: bdqm

update.where: column_name = 'nom' AND cbs_table_id = (SELECT id FROM public.cbs_tables WHERE table_name = 'bkcli')
column_name = 'lang' AND cbs_table_id = (SELECT id FROM public.cbs_tables WHERE table_name = 'bkcli')
column_name = 'emtit' AND cbs_table_id = (SELECT id FROM public.cbs_tables WHERE table_name = 'bkcli')
column_name = 'clcr' AND cbs_table_id = (SELECT id FROM public.cbs_tables WHERE table_name = 'bkcli')
column_name = 'pre' AND cbs_table_id = (SELECT id FROM public.cbs_tables WHERE table_name = 'bkcli')
column_name = 'midname' AND cbs_table_id = (SELECT id FROM public.cbs_tables WHERE table_name = 'bkcli')
column_name = 'sit' AND cbs_table_id = (SELECT id FROM public.cbs_tables WHERE table_name = 'bkcli')
column_name = 'sext' AND cbs_table_id = (SELECT id FROM public.cbs_tables WHERE table_name = 'bkcli')
column_name = 'dna' AND cbs_table_id = (SELECT id FROM public.cbs_tables WHERE table_name = 'bkcli')
column_name = 'viln' AND cbs_table_id = (SELECT id FROM public.cbs_tables WHERE table_name = 'bkcli')
column_name = 'payn' AND cbs_table_id = (SELECT id FROM public.cbs_tables WHERE table_name = 'bkcli')
column_name = 'nmer' AND cbs_table_id = (SELECT id FROM public.cbs_tables WHERE table_name = 'bkcli')
column_name = 'tid' AND cbs_table_id = (SELECT id FROM public.cbs_tables WHERE table_name = 'bkcli')
column_name = 'nid' AND cbs_table_id = (SELECT id FROM public.cbs_tables WHERE table_name = 'bkcli')
column_name = 'vid' AND cbs_table_id = (SELECT id FROM public.cbs_tables WHERE table_name = 'bkcli')
column_name = 'did' AND cbs_table_id = (SELECT id FROM public.cbs_tables WHERE table_name = 'bkcli')
column_name = 'lid' AND cbs_table_id = (SELECT id FROM public.cbs_tables WHERE table_name = 'bkcli')
column_name = 'oid' AND cbs_table_id = (SELECT id FROM public.cbs_tables WHERE table_name = 'bkcli')
column_name = 'nidn' AND cbs_table_id = (SELECT id FROM public.cbs_tables WHERE table_name = 'bkcli')
column_name = 'nbenf' AND cbs_table_id = (SELECT id FROM public.cbs_tables WHERE table_name = 'bkcli')
column_name = 'nat' AND cbs_table_id = (SELECT id FROM public.cbs_tables WHERE table_name = 'bkcli')
column_name = 'res' AND cbs_table_id = (SELECT id FROM public.cbs_tables WHERE table_name = 'bkcli')
column_name = 'rso' AND cbs_table_id = (SELECT id FROM public.cbs_tables WHERE table_name = 'bkcli')
column_name = 'datc' AND cbs_table_id = (SELECT id FROM public.cbs_tables WHERE table_name = 'bkcli')
column_name = 'fju' AND cbs_table_id = (SELECT id FROM public.cbs_tables WHERE table_name = 'bkcli')
column_name = 'nrc' AND cbs_table_id = (SELECT id FROM public.cbs_tables WHERE table_name = 'bkcli')
column_name = 'npa' AND cbs_table_id = (SELECT id FROM public.cbs_tables WHERE table_name = 'bkcli')
column_name = 'nicr' AND cbs_table_id = (SELECT id FROM public.cbs_tables WHERE table_name = 'bkcli')
column_name = 'nis' AND cbs_table_id = (SELECT id FROM public.cbs_tables WHERE table_name = 'bkcli')
column_name = 'nidf' AND cbs_table_id = (SELECT id FROM public.cbs_tables WHERE table_name = 'bkcli')
column_name = 'sig' AND cbs_table_id = (SELECT id FROM public.cbs_tables WHERE table_name = 'bkcli')
column_name = 'rso2' AND cbs_table_id = (SELECT id FROM public.cbs_tables WHERE table_name = 'bkcli')
column_name = 'age' AND cbs_table_id = (SELECT id FROM public.cbs_tables WHERE table_name = 'bkcli')
column_name = 'ges' AND cbs_table_id = (SELECT id FROM public.cbs_tables WHERE table_name = 'bkcli')
column_name = 'qua' AND cbs_table_id = (SELECT id FROM public.cbs_tables WHERE table_name = 'bkcli')
column_name = 'seg' AND cbs_table_id = (SELECT id FROM public.cbs_tables WHERE table_name = 'bkcli')
column_name = 'catl' AND cbs_table_id = (SELECT id FROM public.cbs_tables WHERE table_name = 'bkcli')
column_name = 'tax' AND cbs_table_id = (SELECT id FROM public.cbs_tables WHERE table_name = 'bkcli')
column_name = 'sec' AND cbs_table_id = (SELECT id FROM public.cbs_tables WHERE table_name = 'bkcli')
column_name = 'lienbq' AND cbs_table_id = (SELECT id FROM public.cbs_tables WHERE table_name = 'bkcli')

changeSet.comment: Seed Amplitude API field path mappings for bkcli columns
